---
title: "Welcome"
---

Hello. Welcome to my personal website!

I was raised in Honduras and at the moment I am living in Germany. I am a doctoral researcher at the Cluster of Excellence, SimTech in Stuttgart, Germany and a research assistant at TU Dortmund. My supervisor is [Prof. Dr. Paul Bürkner](https://paul-buerkner.github.io). Before, I studied a Master's degree in Probability and Statistics at the Center for Research in Mathematics [CIMAT](https://www.cimat.mx) in Guanajuato, Mexico, under the supervision of [Dr. Andrés Christen](https://www.cimat.mx/~jac/).

I am interested in Bayesian Inference, Prior specification, Bayesian Computation, Probabilistic Programming and High Dimensional Statistics.

Be sure to contact me if you ever want to work together or if you have doubts or comments about my work.
